name: STT Benchmark Run
short_description: End-to-end evaluation of one STT configuration on gold-92: transcription, metric computation, and significance testing.
detailed_description: Covers tasks that run a fully specified STT configuration (model/API + optional post-correction + optional routing policy) on the gold-92 benchmark and produce entity accuracy, WER, intent preservation, and latency metrics with BCa bootstrap confidence intervals. Every evaluation task in this project follows this shape: DVC-pull audio, call transcription, compute metrics, run significance test vs Deepgram baseline, package results. Unlike baseline-evaluation (which is open-ended), this type has a fixed output schema tied to the registered project metrics.
